description_long: This is a modern bullpup-style rifle with a matte olive green body and a prominent black barrel assembly. The rifle features a compact, angular design with the magazine located behind the trigger, characteristic of bullpup configurations. The grip and magazine are both textured in a tan color, providing visual contrast and likely improved handling. A large cylindrical scope or sighting device is mounted on top, suggesting the rifle is intended for precision or tactical use. The barrel is long and slender, extending forward from the main body, and there is no visible muzzle device attached. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal and polymer, typical of contemporary military or law enforcement rifles.
description: A compact, olive green bullpup rifle with a tan grip and magazine, topped with a large black scope. The design is modern and angular, with a long barrel and no visible muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full olive green body, tan grip and magazine, and the large black scope mounted on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the scope above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the bullpup layout and scope.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the rifle, the magazine, and the scope's rear profile.
